title: Pricing — Lily | Honest Pricing for Every Side
description: Free for the people seeking care. Transparent for practitioners. Priced to scale for organizations. No surprise fees, no per-message charges, no upcharges on crisis support.
keywords: therapy platform pricing, mental health benefit cost, EAP pricing, therapist practice management cost, PEPM behavioral health, free therapy matching
heroSubtitle: Free for the people seeking care. Transparent for practitioners. Priced to scale for organizations. No surprise fees, no per-message charges, no upcharges on crisis support.

sections.heading: For members & their families
sections.body: If your employer, plan, or school covers Lily, everything below is free for you and your dependents.

sections.heading: For organizations
sections.body: Per eligible employee, per month. Volume discounts at 1k, 5k, 25k. Annual billing.

sections.heading: For practitioners
sections.body: Two ways to work with Lily. Pick what fits your practice.

sections.heading: What every plan includes — at no extra cost.

cta.title: Pricing that scales with the work, not against it.
cta.subtitle: Member, practitioner, organization — start where you are.
